name: awen
description: A Qt Quick application framework and the apps built on it.

dependencies.$comment: The test binaries are built and run natively; there is no runner on wasm, and an android cross-build cannot execute the binary gtest_discover_tests runs at build time.
dependencies.name: gtest

dependencies.$comment: Backs awen.gamepad on desktop and wasm (SDL's emscripten backend wraps the browser Gamepad API); android compiles an inert stub instead. default-features off: the port's linux defaults (ibus/wayland/x11) break the link via SDL's IME, and the gamepad backend (evdev) needs none of them.
dependencies.name: sdl3

dependencies.$comment: Host-tool Qt (qmlcachegen, moc, ...) with default features stripped. thread + concurrent must stay: without them host qtdeclarative fails to configure ('Qt6::QmlLSPrivate ... target was not found').
dependencies.name: qtbase

dependencies.$comment: Target Qt trimmed to what Qt Quick rendering needs on each platform's default backend: OpenGL on desktop, GLES2 in the browser, xcb windowing + fontconfig font discovery on linux, freetype on wasm (no system fonts in the browser sandbox). qtdeclarative itself re-adds network and testlib.
dependencies.name: qtbase

features.$comment: Every platform, wasm included: this maps to Qt's umbrella FEATURE_opengl. gles2 alone only selects the backend, and without opengl the wasm platform plugin fails to compile.
features.name: opengl

features.$comment: Selects the GLES backend in place of desktop GL (WebGL in the browser, EGL/GLES on android); load-bearing on emscripten.
features.name: gles2

features.$comment: No system fonts in the browser sandbox, and android feeds /system/fonts through the FreeType engine.
features.name: freetype

features.$comment: Without dnslookup the QtNetwork dylib fails to link on macOS/Linux (undefined _res_9_ninit). Excluded on emscripten, where it breaks Qt's configure (no resolver in the browser sandbox).
features.name: dnslookup

features.$comment: qtbase 6.11 gates the windeployqt tool behind this feature; without it the deploy install step fails with 'No Qt deploy tool available'.
features.name: windeployqt
